articles.title: Vietnam boat accident: Andhra Pradesh CM directs expedited return of affected tourists, mortal remains
articles.sum: Officials also told the Chief Minister that the Indian Embassy in Vietnam has engaged an agency to facilitate the handover and transportation of the bodies of the deceased

articles.title: Pallapatla mourns its illustrious daughter S. Janaki
articles.sum: Residents recall the legendary singer’s childhood in the village as tributes pour in, with Chief Minister N. Chandrababu Naidu saying her timeless voice touched generations

articles.title: Dy CM sounds alert on leopard movement at Tirumala
articles.sum: The Deputy Chief Minister asked the Forest Department and TTD wings to coordinate, deploy H.A.N.U.M.A.N teams and clear thickets, and advised pilgrims on the footpath to move in groups

articles.title: Phone flung during ED raid may crack global gold smuggling case
articles.sum: Enforcement Directorate agents are examining Dharmesh Sangani's recovered mobile phone. This businessman faces probes in the UK and US for alleged gold smuggling. The device was retrieved after Sangani threw it from his apartment as agents approached. Authorities suspect a larger...

articles.title: Stakeholders: PM, CMs removal clause 'unconstitutional'
articles.sum: A parliamentary panel noted concerns about the anti-corruption bill's arrest clause. Stakeholders found removing officials after thirty days constitutionally problematic. The draft report suggests a sunset clause for automatic reversal of barring. It also proposes using "suspensi...

articles.title: Rotten eggs, spoiled parathas: Swiggy gets 9 notices from FSSAI
articles.sum: Swiggy Instamart received nine FSSAI notices for delivering unsafe and expired food products. Consumers complained about receiving rotten eggs and spoiled parathas from the platform. Expired whey protein and packaged snacks were also among the flagged items by customers. The food...

articles.title: Claim Hindu law is based on 'Manusmriti' wrong, says SG Tushar Mehta
articles.sum: Solicitor General Tushar Mehta stated Hindu law is not based on Manusmriti. Most of India follows the Mitakshara school, which is based on Yajnavalkya Smriti. This school, prevalent since before 700 AD, grants inheritance rights by birth. The Dayabhaga school, prevalent in Bengal...

articles.title: Vietnam tragedy: 15 Indian tourists killed as boat capsizes near Phu Quoc
articles.sum: Fifteen Indian tourists died and seventeen were injured when a speedboat capsized near Vietnam's Phu Quoc island. The vessel was carrying mobile phone dealers from Andhra Pradesh and Telangana on a company trip. Rescue operations were launched immediately by nearby vessels and em...

articles.title: India, New Zealand upgrade their “made for each other’ ties, boost defence and security, sports cooperation
articles.sum: India, New Zealand upgrade their “made for each other’ ties, boost defence and security, sports cooperation

articles.title: PM Modi flags FCRA nod for Golden Temple to woo Sikh diaspora
articles.sum: Prime Minister Narendra Modi highlighted his government's initiatives for the Sikh community. He mentioned FCRA clearance for the Golden Temple and bringing back Guru Granth Sahib copies. Work is ongoing to connect Hemkund Sahib with a ropeway for better pilgrim access. The gover...

articles.title: 3 UN special rapporteurs flag 'opaque' SIR process; Election Commission dismisses concerns as baseless
articles.sum: UN rapporteurs raised concerns about India's voter list revision process and alleged exclusion of minorities. Election Commission officials strongly refuted these allegations, calling them unfounded and unwarranted. The poll panel asserted that the special intensive revision proc...

articles.title: England too good for India as Buttler hits 131
articles.sum: Jos Buttler's sublime 131 and Harry Brook's unbeaten 95 help England crush India in the fifth T20 and replace their opponents at the top of the world rankings.

articles.title: Tensions erupt in West Bengal after 11-year-old raped and murdered
articles.sum: The girl's body was fished out from a pond on Sunday - a day after her family reported her missing.

articles.title: US launches fresh strikes on Iran after IRGC attacks ship, shuts Strait of Hormuz
articles.sum: US launches fresh strikes on Iran after IRGC attacks ship shuts Strait of Hormuz
